---
id: get-start-dates
title: "Get available start dates for next N months"
description: "Retrieve specific available check-in dates for a property over the next N months. Unlike startDays (which returns day-of-week rules), this returns actual calendar dates that are open for new bookings. Use this to populate an availability calendar with selectable dates."
sidebar_label: "Get available start dates for next N months"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get available start dates for next N months"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/developer/properties/{id}/start-dates"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve specific available check-in dates for a property over the next N months. Unlike startDays (which returns day-of-week rules), this returns actual calendar dates that are open for new bookings. Use this to populate an availability calendar with selectable dates.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>

</RequestSchema>
